title: Gun Stocks Surge Higher As Supreme Court Rejects New York's Concealed Carry Law

title: Axon Enterprise: Building An Impenetrable Fortress
text: Axon Enterprise is an American business which develops hardware and software products for military, law enforcement, and civilians. Axon benefits from high switching costs, a strong brand, and possesses a cornered resource in Co-Founder and CEO, Rick Smith.
